About

Systems-oriented Data Engineer focused on the industrialization of data science. Specialized in building reliable ETL pipelines, optimizing SQL-based systems, and developing automated evaluation frameworks for LLMs.

Strong mathematical foundation in probability and statistics.

Did you know?

I am currently studying Mandarin Chinese | adding it to a growing toolkit alongside Python, SQL, and Bash.
